title: Smoky Skillet Pork Chops
description: A delicious American-style dish featuring smoky and charred flavors, made with tender pork chops cooked in a skillet.
instructions: Preheat the skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the pork chops with salt and black pepper.
Add the pork chops to the skillet and cook for 5-6 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 145°F.
Remove the pork chops from the skillet and set them aside to rest.
Add the chopped onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until they are tender.
Stir in the smoky BBQ sauce and bring to a simmer.
Return the pork chops to the skillet and coat them with the BBQ sauce.
Simmer the pork chops for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until they are coated in the sauce.
Serve the pork chops hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
